title: Criminal Complaints: Mr. John Edward Mccosh
text:
Mr. John Edward Mccosh, a former Audit Committee and Independent Director of Green Tech Ventures Public Company Limited, has changed his securities holding. In this regard, Mr. John has the duty to prepare and disclose a report regarding his holding securities and the changes to such holdings (Form 59) within June 7, 2022. However, Mr. John prepared and disclosed the report (Form 59) to the SEC office on June 10, 2022

Outcome: This case is in the process of inquiry by the inquiry official.
name: Mr. John Edward Mccosh
